title: Training Lead for Dogs 3m 5m 10m 15m 20m 25m 30m Strong Nylon Rope Extra Long Line Dog Lead Leash with Padded Handle for Large Medium Small Puppy Recall Pet Walking Obedience Outdoor Play
features: Nylon leash: The seamless stitching is what keeps the dog training leads intact and unified
Comfortable: Padded handle of this extra long dog lead provides comfort and ease to your hand
Swivel hook: Training leads for dogs has a perfectly sewn heavy-duty hook that rotates 360 degrees
Pet training: This puppy training lead is exceptional to teach recall & obedience to your dog
Versatile: Poodle or a Husky, long leads for dog training are suitable for a variety of big & small dogs
description: Product Description Loutep Dog Training Lead The Loutep training lead is a high-quality dog long line that is long and sturdy, making it ideal for allowing your dog to run and play freely while still under your control. This durable and practical long lead is suitable for walking, training, running, and playing, making it an essential tool for any dog owner. Whether you're teaching your dog new tricks or just enjoying a leisurely walk in the park, this long line training dog lead will help you keep your furry friend close by. You and your dog will love using this training lead for years to come Top Features 1.Seamless Stitching The nylon leash is flawlessly and securely stitched, providing longevity and ensuring it will last for the long run. Our training leads for dogs UK are designed to complement this high-quality leash, allowing you to train your furry friend with ease and comfort 2.Durable and soft The long leash is made of superior quality nylon, providing both smoothness and durability. With its extended length, you can give your furry friend more freedom to roam and explore, while still keeping them safely by your side. Whether you're going for a walk in the park or a hike in the mountains, this long leash is the perfect companion for any adventure. 3.Thickness and width The thickness and width of the leash are chosen precisely to provide the best comfort for you and your dog during long leash recall training sessions. With its durable construction and secure grip, this leash is the perfect tool for pet owners looking to train their dogs in a safe and effective way. Long Dog Leads are Suitable For: Large Dogs Medium Dogs Small Dogs Nylon Training Lead Training lead, made of high-quality nylon, provides a great experience while using it with your pet. It is lightweight, smooth, and soft for your hands Soft Padded Handle Comfortable handle is 36 cm long made of fine quality neoprene, its softness provides extra comfort to your hand and prevents burns. Durable Metal hook Swivel hook is heavy-duty and made of premium quality material. It is durable, sturdy, and keeps on working for years. It rotates 360 degrees and is easy to wear and remove from a dog harness.
